meta.title: Stackly — Every euro of your software, visible
meta.description: Stackly finds every SaaS and AI tool your company pays for, alerts you before each renewal, and brings order to purchasing.

hero.eyebrow: SaaS + AI spend management for teams of 25–500
hero.titleMain: Every euro of your software and AI spend, visible.
hero.subtitle: Stackly finds every SaaS and AI tool your company pays for, alerts you before each renewal, and brings order to purchasing — no integrations required: start with your bank's CSV.
hero.micro: No credit card · Your inventory in 15 minutes

demo.title: Your renewals runway
demo.hintMobile: next 120 days · sorted by days remaining
demo.alertMessage: Email + Teams to the owner and Finance: «Salesforce renews on July 11 for €38,400. The cancellation notice deadline is today».

logoStrip.label: Understand the stack you already use — SaaS and AI

pains.title: Software spend keeps growing. Control doesn't.
pains.subtitle: Between corporate cards, emailed invoices, and tools every team signs up for on its own, nobody has the full picture.

wasted.title: of SaaS spend is wasted
wasted.body: Unused licenses, duplicate tools, and oversized plans nobody reviews because nobody sees them.

lockIn.title: is what a missed renewal costs you
lockIn.body: Annual contracts auto-renew silently. Miss the notice window and you pay a full year for something you meant to cancel.

friction.title: to start seeing everything
friction.body: No integrations, no IT, no months-long project: import your bank's CSV and Stackly recognizes your vendors.

ai.title: AI is the new shadow IT. Stackly has it in the catalog.
ai.subtitle: Personal subscriptions on company cards, team seats that get duplicated, variable-cost APIs nobody budgeted for. AI spend is growing faster than any other category — with less control than any of them.

catalog.title: AI tools in the catalog
catalog.body: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Midjourney, Copilot, Cursor, ElevenLabs, Perplexity… with the aliases they use on your bank statement.

duplicated.title: the same AI tool, paid for three times
duplicated.body: Marketing with its Plus plan, Product with its Team plan, a dev with an API key. Stackly groups the charges and shows you the overlap before you renew.

variable.title: usage-based cost counts too
variable.body: API charges (OpenAI, Anthropic, ElevenLabs) aren't fixed subscriptions: Stackly reconciles them the same way and adds them to your real spend per vendor.

how.title: From bank statement to full control, in three steps.
how.subtitle: Built to start today, not after a quarter-long rollout.

step1.label: STEP 1
step1.title: Import your spend
step1.body: Upload your bank or accounting CSV. Stackly automatically recognizes SaaS charges — «PDDLE.NET* LOOM» included — and builds your inventory.

step2.label: STEP 2
step2.title: Fill in contracts and seats
step2.body: Renewal date, cancellation notice, per-person licenses. From here, Stackly calculates utilization and wasted euros.

step3.label: STEP 3
step3.title: Sleep easy
step3.body: Alerts at 90, 60, 30 and 7 days by email and Teams, before every notice window closes. Plus an approval flow for every new purchase.

features.title: Everything Finance and IT have wanted for years.

dashboard.title: Spend dashboard
dashboard.body: Total annualized spend, by category and by department. Figures that match accounting.

runway.title: Renewals runway
runway.body: Every contract positioned by days remaining, with the cancellation notice front and center.

inventory.title: Vendor inventory
inventory.body: A catalog of 650+ SaaS and AI tools with autocomplete, owners, contracts and attached documents.

licenses.title: Licenses and utilization
licenses.body: Seats purchased vs. used, and the exact cost of the ones sitting empty.

reconciliation.title: Bank reconciliation
reconciliation.body: Every statement transaction linked to its vendor, with automatic suggestions.

approvals.title: Requests and approvals
approvals.body: A flow by department and amount, with a “you already have this” warning to avoid duplicates.

final.title: Your SaaS inventory, this afternoon.
final.subtitle: Create your organization, upload a CSV, and see your renewals runway with real data.

footer.tagline: visibility and control for your SaaS stack

signup.title: Create your organization
signup.tagline: Start controlling your SaaS stack in minutes
